name: ltspice-automation
description: Create visible LTspice schematics from natural-language RC low-pass requests.

interface.shortDescription: Turn RC low-pass requests into visible LTspice schematics.
interface.longDescription: Local Codex tools that generate LTspice .asc schematics, open them in the LTspice GUI, run batch simulations for validation, and parse LTspice log measurements. The stable natural-language visual flow currently targets RC low-pass circuits.
defaultPrompt: Create a visible LTspice RC low-pass schematic.
Open and simulate this generated LTspice circuit.
Check my LTspice schematic log for errors.
